summary: Theme toggle feature testing complete. All 8 test cases passed. Dark/Light mode switching works correctly with localStorage persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Console 404 errors for /api/backups endpoints - expected behavior (backup feature only in local version)
Theme implementation uses CSS override approach with [data-theme='light'] selector - clean and maintainable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle feature fully implemented and working. Theme state stored in localStorage as 'mill_theme'. Toggle button data-testid='theme-toggle-btn' in main app header, 'login-theme-toggle' on login page. CSS overrides in App.css using [data-theme='light'] selector.

login_page_toggle.description: Theme toggle button visible on login page (top-right corner), switches between dark/light modes

main_app_toggle.description: Theme toggle button visible in header after login, switches between dark/light modes

light_mode_styling.description: Light mode: Background is light gradient (f8fafc to e2e8f0), text is dark (#1e293b), cards are white with subtle shadows, header has semi-transparent white background

dark_mode_styling.description: Dark mode: slate-900 background, white text, slate-800 cards - unchanged from original

theme_persistence.description: Theme preference persists in localStorage - after page reload, selected theme is maintained

icon_change.description: Sun icon shown in dark mode (to switch to light), Moon icon shown in light mode (to switch to dark). Title attribute shows appropriate tooltip.

all_tabs_light_mode.description: All tabs render correctly in light mode with proper styling

about_section.description: About section in Settings tab shows 'Developed by Host9x Team' and 'Version 1.1'

previous_bug_fixes_status: Not explicitly retested in this iteration - focus was on theme toggle feature. Previous iteration_8 confirmed: printing, truck payment rate editing, agent payment calculation all working.
notes: Theme toggle transition is smooth (0.3s ease on background-color, 0.2s ease on color)
Login page maintains separate theme state that syncs with localStorage
Scrollbar styling also updates based on theme
All colored cards (green, blue, amber, red backgrounds) have appropriate light-mode overrides
